vocab.meaning: mọc lên nhanh chóng (với số lượng lớn)
vocab.example: In recent years, high-rise apartments and trendy cafes have been springing up like mushrooms all over the district.

vocab.meaning: phá dỡ (một tòa nhà hoặc cấu trúc)
vocab.example: Many of the old, dilapidated houses were pulled down to make way for a state-of-the-art shopping mall.
What used to be a quiet, suburban area has completely transformed into a vibrant commercial hub.

vocab.meaning: san lấp/lát nền (thường làm mất đi không gian xanh)
vocab.example: It's a bit of a shame that they've paved over the local park to create more parking spaces for the new office blocks.

vocab.meaning: gây ra, dẫn đến (sự thay đổi)
vocab.example: The construction of the new metro line has brought about significant changes to the way people commute in this area.

vocab.meaning: cải thiện, làm sạch đẹp hơn (môi trường, khu vực)
vocab.example: The local council has put in a lot of effort to clean up the riverside, turning it into a popular spot for evening strolls.
The influx of new businesses has pushed up property prices, making it quite difficult for young families to buy a home here.
Old, polluting factories are being phased out in favor of eco-friendly tech parks.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ cho (nhu cầu/đối tượng cụ thể)
vocab.example: A plethora of high-end restaurants have opened to cater to the growing number of young professionals moving to the area.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng hoạt động/phát triển thêm các lĩnh vực mới
vocab.example: The local economy used to rely solely on agriculture, but it has now branched out into tourism and services.
